task_description: Create a new HTML page public/pages/mifip.html for the MiFuture Income Protector (MiFIP) product. The page must use the shared CSS design system, contain question-based persuasive content, premium banding table, error-free calculator with band determination logic, FAQ, and WhatsApp CTA.

verification.summary: File created (41KB), all structural elements verified (style.css link, site-header/footer, main.js). JavaScript syntax validated (2 script blocks, both valid). Calculator logic tested with boundary values for all bands in both IDR and USD, premium calculations verified, benefit percentages correct. FAQ accordion and WA integration present.
